instruction: Apply the rubric to the candidate response and return the verdict.

inquiry.subject: Annual invoice question — INV-9921
inquiry.body: Hi, our annual invoice INV-9921 shows the renewal at $48,000, but our signed purchase order is for $42,000. Could you check?

candidate_response.subject: Re: Annual invoice question — INV-9921
candidate_response.body: Hi, thanks for catching this on invoice INV-9921. I've reviewed it against your purchase order and you're correct: the renewal should be billed at $42,000. I've initiated a corrected invoice and you'll receive the updated INV-9921 by end of business tomorrow, with the original voided in our system. Best regards, Billing Team.

rationale_hint: All 5 criteria pass: addresses invoice mismatch (C1), concrete action and next-day ETA (C2), within scope (correction of an obvious billing error, C3), professional (C4), references INV-9921 correctly (C5).

provenance.source_benchmark: WONDERBREAD SOP Ranking and Demo Validation (Wornow et al., 2024); Kourani et al. (2025) self-improvement; TheAgentCompany feedback subtasks (Xu et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed inquiry / candidate-response pair and rubric; task semantics follow the LLM-as-Judge pattern of the cited benchmarks. No benchmark text or data is reproduced.
